Robert Wildgoose

Portfolio Of Work

Todaily

What Is It?

A Swift iOS ToDo list app allowing the user to create projects and tasks and monitor the progress on each one.

View In App Store

iPhone Screenshots

iPad Screenshots

Release Notes

Version 2.6.0

Categorised Emojis List
Ability To Change Project Emojis
Private Projects (Lock Projects Behind A Passworded Screen)

May 4, 2021

Version 2.5.1

UI Fixes For Dark Mode
Edit Mode For Projects

Apr 27, 2021

Version 2.5.0

You can now customise your projects even more by adding emojis as project icons

Apr 21, 2021

Version 2.4.0

Ability To Complete Tasks
Ability To Undo Completion Of Tasks
Swipe Actions On Tasks
See Incomplete tasks count on homepage

Apr 15, 2021

Version 2.3.0

This release allows you to add updates and comments to your tasks. This release also resolves some issues relating to adding projects.

Mar 31, 2021

Version 2.2.2

Small Fixes Projects
Small Fixes Tasks

Mar 25, 2021

Version 2.2.1

Create projects for your tasks so you can monitor the progression of a project.
New icons/statuses for priorities.

Mar 24, 2021

Version 2.1

Fixed some issues with older devices
Fixed some issues with text not showing correctly.

Feb 1, 2021

Version 2.0

Need More Info? - Tasks Now Have Descriptions
Need To Know What You Added Last? - Tasks Can Now Be Sorted By Date
Got A Task That You Will Never Do? - You Can Now Archive Tasks
Scrapping Your Entire Todo List? - You Can Now Clear All

Jan 16, 2021

Version 1.0

Initial Upload

Jan 10, 2021
